text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back to the academy, something
catches Grass Wonder's attention.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa, look't these... They're all so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Spe! What's that you're looking at?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh—hi, Grass! And... hello, Trainer! How are you
this evening?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was just looking at the kimonos over in that
shop window! Look, aren't they pretty?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're gorgeous... and all made from a
high-end hemp fabric, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A what? Y-you must know a lot about clothes!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I dabble a little, is all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aw, I'm jealous. I bet you're used to wearing
kimonos like these, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I only got to wear one for Shichi-Go-San when I
was little. My mom got it for me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Actually, that makes me envious of you, Spe. I
never got to celebrate Shichi-Go-San when I was
growing up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, that's right. You were in America,
weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Out of everyone I knew, I was the only one
with my own kimono.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, I wished I could dress up together
with girls my age.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without losing her usual smile, Grass Wonder
gazes distantly into the shop window.
choice_data_list: Why don't you two dress up now, then?
How about we hold a race in kimonos?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now as in... right now?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Look at the sign, Grass! It says we can try
them on!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, my... Hehe. So that's what you were referring to.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So you... don't mind if we take this small detour?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Hehe. Now, which to put on... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder tries on kimonos with Special
Week, looking as happy as can be.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Goodness. Hehe. That sounds like a blast.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha—?! But I, uh... I don't know how to put it on!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: There's no need to fret, Spe. I'll help you out. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And of course, you'll be joining us as well,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By all means. One of these days, we should go
kimono shopping for you as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I wonder what design would suit you
best. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder appears to have thoroughly
enjoyed herself today.
